prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(open_classification_case import_case_1)
(assign_correspondent_agent_to_case import_case_1 correspondent_agent_1)
(attach_evidence_to_case import_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(complete_case_intake import_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(propose_primary_candidate_for_import_case import_case_1 primary_classification_candidate_1 product_evidence_1)
(assign_subject_matter_expert_to_case import_case_1 subject_matter_expert_1)
(expert_validate_primary_candidate import_case_1 primary_classification_candidate_1 subject_matter_expert_1)
(release_subject_matter_expert_from_case import_case_1 subject_matter_expert_1)
(release_evidence_from_case import_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(open_classification_case export_case_1)
(assign_correspondent_agent_to_case export_case_1 correspondent_agent_2)
(attach_evidence_to_case export_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(complete_case_intake export_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(propose_secondary_candidate_for_export_case export_case_1 secondary_classification_candidate_1 product_evidence_1)
(assign_subject_matter_expert_to_case export_case_1 subject_matter_expert_1)
(expert_validate_secondary_candidate export_case_1 secondary_classification_candidate_1 subject_matter_expert_1)
(release_evidence_from_case export_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(attach_evidence_to_case import_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(release_subject_matter_expert_from_case export_case_1 subject_matter_expert_1)
(assemble_compliance_submission_template import_case_1 export_case_1 primary_classification_candidate_1 secondary_classification_candidate_1 compliance_submission_template_1)
(validate_compliance_submission_template_for_case compliance_submission_template_1 import_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(consolidate_import_case_outcome import_case_1 compliance_submission_template_1)
(consolidate_export_case_outcome export_case_1 compliance_submission_template_1)
(claim_clearance_token_for_entity import_case_1 clearance_token_1 product_evidence_1)
(issue_clearance_and_release_agent_for_import_case import_case_1 correspondent_agent_1 clearance_token_1)
(release_evidence_from_case import_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(attach_evidence_to_case export_case_1 product_evidence_1)
(claim_clearance_token_for_entity export_case_1 clearance_token_1 product_evidence_1)
(issue_clearance_and_release_agent_for_export_case export_case_1 correspondent_agent_2 clearance_token_1)
(open_classification_case work_item_1)
(assign_correspondent_agent_to_case work_item_1 correspondent_agent_1)
(attach_evidence_to_case work_item_1 product_evidence_1)
(complete_case_intake work_item_1 product_evidence_1)
(assign_external_ruling_to_work_item work_item_1 external_ruling_1 product_evidence_1)
(assign_subject_matter_expert_to_case work_item_1 subject_matter_expert_1)
(acknowledge_external_ruling_for_work_item work_item_1 subject_matter_expert_1)
(attach_legal_opinion_to_work_item work_item_1 legal_opinion_1)
(attach_legal_opinion_to_work_item_post_ruling work_item_1 legal_opinion_1)
(finalize_work_item_post_ruling work_item_1)
(claim_clearance_token_for_entity work_item_1 clearance_token_1 product_evidence_1)
(issue_clearance_and_release_agent_for_work_item work_item_1 correspondent_agent_1 clearance_token_1)
(release_evidence_from_case work_item_1 product_evidence_1)
(release_legal_opinion_from_work_item work_item_1 legal_opinion_1)
(release_subject_matter_expert_from_case work_item_1 subject_matter_expert_1)
(open_classification_case work_item_2)
(assign_correspondent_agent_to_case work_item_2 correspondent_agent_1)
(attach_evidence_to_case work_item_2 product_evidence_1)
(complete_case_intake work_item_2 product_evidence_1)
(bind_regulatory_reference_to_work_item work_item_2 regulatory_reference_2 compliance_submission_template_1)
(finalize_work_item_template_binding work_item_2 regulatory_reference_2 compliance_submission_template_1 product_evidence_1)
(attach_tariff_note_to_work_item work_item_2 tariff_note_1)
(assign_subject_matter_expert_to_case work_item_2 subject_matter_expert_1)
(integrate_tariff_note_into_work_item_for_submission work_item_2 tariff_note_1 subject_matter_expert_1 regulatory_reference_2 compliance_submission_template_1)
(attach_legal_opinion_to_work_item work_item_2 legal_opinion_1)
(apply_legal_opinion_to_work_item_for_submission work_item_2 legal_opinion_1 regulatory_reference_2 compliance_submission_template_1)
(record_work_item_signoff work_item_2)
(claim_clearance_token_for_entity work_item_2 clearance_token_1 product_evidence_1)
(issue_clearance_and_release_agent_for_work_item work_item_2 correspondent_agent_1 clearance_token_1)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem involves tariff classification assignment with import_case_1, export_case_1, work_item_1, work_item_2, and various agents, evidence, experts, etc.


## Examining Tariff Classification

- The task focuses on assigning tariff classifications for import_case_1 and export_case_1, involving work_item_1 and work_item_2.
- Various agents, evidence, and experts are part of the process to determine the correct classification.

## Examining Tariff Classification
- Filing for import_case_1, export_case_1, work_item_1, and work_item_2 requires entity_authorized_for_filing, involving entity_authorization_issued and issue_clearance_and_release_agent.
- Entity authorization depends on claim_clearance_token_for_entity, needing entity_ready_for_authorization, clearance_token_available, and entity_has_evidence.

## Processing Work Items
- Work items, subtypes of case_branch_export and classification_case, can be finalized via record_work_item_signoff, finalize_work_item_review, or finalize_work_item_post_ruling.
- Finalization methods require actions like final_annotation_complete or review, linked to compliance_submission_template_1.

## Managing Evidence
- Only product_evidence_1 is available, raising questions about sharing it across multiple cases since entity_has_evidence is case-specific.
- Actions like attach_evidence_to_case need entity_intake_opened and entity_assigned, with complete_case_intake requiring entity_has_evidence.

## Validating Candidates
- Proposing primary candidates for cases like import_case_1 requires entity_has_evidence and marks primary_candidate_marked.
- Expert validation, such as expert_validate_primary_candidate, sets import_case_processing, ensuring processing_ready and candidate_validated.

## Handling Case Intake

- Complete intake for import_case_1 by opening, assigning an agent, attaching evidence, and completing intake, marking it ready for proposal.
- For export_case_1, propose secondary candidate using product_evidence_1, requiring intake_complete, has_evidence, and has_secondary (true).

## Assigning Experts

- Assign subject_matter_expert_1 to import_case_1 using assign_subject_matter_expert_to_case, needing intake_complete and expert_available, setting entity_assigned_expert.
- To assign the same expert to export_case_1, release from import_case_1 first using release_subject_matter_expert_from_case to make them available again.

## Validating Candidates

- Expert_validate_primary_candidate for import_case_1 sets processing_ready and validated, requiring marked (set by propose) and entity_assigned_expert.
- Similarly, expert_validate_secondary_candidate for export_case_1 requires entity_assigned_expert, ensuring the expert is assigned to that case.

## Assembling Compliance Templates

- Assemble compliance_submission_template_1 for both import_case_1 and export_case_1, needing processing_ready, marked candidates, and template_available, setting template_prepared.
- Validate_compliance_submission_template for import_case_1 requires prepared template, processing_ready, and entity_has_evidence, setting it validated.

## Finalizing Case Outcomes

- Consolidate_import_case_outcome for import_case_1 sets ready_for_auth, requiring processing_ready, validated template, and template_prepared.
- Similarly, consolidate_export_case_outcome for export_case_1 follows the same process, ensuring both cases reach ready_for_authorization.

## Assessing Agent Constraints  
- Only three correspondent agents are available for four cases, creating a bottleneck.  
- Agents cannot be released early, as release only happens at issue_clearance, requiring authorization_issued, which is late in the process.  

## Evaluating Intake Requirements  
- All cases, including work_items (case_branch_export), require intake_complete for processing, such as proposing candidates or attaching legal opinions.  
- Complete_case_intake needs entity_assigned (correspondent agent) and has_evidence, with no workaround to skip agent assignment.  

## Exploring Evidence Flexibility  
- Evidence can be attached, used, and released from cases using release_evidence_from_case, making it available for reassignment.  
- However, with only one piece of evidence for four cases, managing evidence reuse remains challenging.  

## Identifying Resource Limitations  
- All paths to ready_for_authorization require intake_complete, which demands agent assignment, stalling progress with limited agents.  
- The system cannot process all four cases to authorized_for_filing given the current constraints of three agents and one evidence.

## Examining Template Assembly

- Assembling a compliance submission template requires marked candidates, validated by experts, and processing readiness, with no initial attribute or legal bindings needed.
- Validating the template for import cases also demands processing readiness and evidence attachment, ensuring compliance with case specifics.

## Binding Regulatory References

- Binding a regulatory reference to a template, like for work_item_2, requires intake completion, an available reference, and a prepared, validated template, consuming the reference.
- This process sets the template as used in the reference and marks it as submission-ready if no additional attributes or legal opinions are required.

## Attaching Tariff and Legal Documents

- Attaching a tariff note to a work_item requires intake completion and availability, setting has_tariff and making it unavailable for other uses.
- Integrating the tariff into the submission needs an assigned subject matter expert and a template not requiring legal opinions, setting attributes_attached.

## Advancing to Final Annotations

- After attributes are attached, applying a legal opinion to the work_item for submission requires no further attribute or legal bindings, setting final_annotation if a legal opinion is available.
- Attaching a legal opinion to the work_item also requires intake completion and availability, but limited legal resources may constrain progress if already used elsewhere.

## Proposing Secondary Candidates  
- Proposing a secondary candidate for export_case_1 marks it with secondary_classification_candidate_1 and product_evidence_1.  
- Assigning a subject matter expert to export_case_1 enables expert validation, leading to readiness.  

## Validating Templates  
- Assembling a compliance submission template for both import_case_1 and export_case_1 prepares it, consuming candidates and making it unavailable.  
- Validating the template for import_case_1 requires reattaching product_evidence_1, previously released from export_case_1, ensuring compliance.  

## Consolidating Case Outcomes  
- Consolidating outcomes for import_case_1 and export_case_1 sets both cases as ready_for_auth, requiring validated templates without needing evidence.  
- Releasing subject matter experts and agents from cases ensures resource availability for further tasks.  

## Claiming Clearance Tokens  
- Claiming clearance tokens for both cases requires evidence attachment and token availability, issuing authorization for filing.  
- Releasing evidence and agents after authorization ensures resources are free for reassignment, completing case processing.

## Managing Resource Availability  
- After issuing clearance for import_case_1, agent1 and evidence are released, making them available for reassignment.  
- Similarly, issuing clearance for export_case_1 releases agent2 and evidence, ensuring resources are free for other cases.  

## Sequencing Evidence Handling  
- Evidence is temporarily attached to import_case_1 for template validation, then released after consolidation, aligning with import claim needs.  
- For export_case_1, evidence is reattached after import processing, enabling the claim process without delays.  

## Expert and Agent Coordination  
- Experts are released from cases after validation, such as releasing the expert from export_case_1 post-validation, ensuring availability for other tasks.  
- Agents, like agent1 and agent2, are assigned sequentially to work_items and cases, with agent3 remaining unused, optimizing resource use.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
